description: Whenever you add a Skill into your Deck, Upgrade it.

name: Toy Box
description: Upon pickup, obtain {Relics} Wax {Relics:plural:Relic|Relics}. Every {Combats} {Combats:plural:combat|combats}, your left-most Wax Relic will melt away.

name: Tri-Boomerang
description: Choose {Cards} {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} in your Deck. Enchant them with Instinct.

name: Tungsten Rod
description: Whenever you would lose HP, lose {HpLossReduction} less.

name: Tuning Fork
description: Every time you play {Cards} Skills, gain {Block} Block.

name: Twisted Funnel
description: At the start of each combat, apply {PoisonPower} Poison to ALL enemies.

name: Unceasing Top
description: Whenever you have no cards in Hand during your turn, draw a card.

name: Undying Sigil
description: Enemies with at least as much Doom as HP deal 50% less damage.

name: Unsettling Lamp
description: Each combat, the first time you play a card that Debuffs an enemy, double its effect.

name: Vajra
description: Start each combat with {StrengthPower} Strength.

name: Vambrace
description: The first time you gain Block from a card each combat, double the amount gained.

name: Velvet Choker
description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. You cannot play more than {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards} per turn.

name: Venerable Tea Set
description: Whenever you enter a Rest Site, start the next combat with an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Very Hot Cocoa
description: Start each combat with an additional {Energy:energyIcons()}.

name: Vexing Puzzlebox
description: At the start of each combat, add a random card into your Hand. It costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

name: Vitruvian Minion
description: Cards containing “Minion” deal double damage and gain double Block.

name: War Hammer
description: Whenever you kill an Elite, Upgrade {Cards} random {Cards:plural:card|cards}.

name: War Paint
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade {Cards} random {Cards:plural:Skill|Skills}.

name: Whetstone
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade {Cards} random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks}.

name: Whispering Earring
description: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} at the start of each turn. Vakuu plays your first turn for you.

name: White Beast Statue
description: Potions always appear in combat rewards.

name: White Star
description: Elites drop an additional Rare card reward.

name: Wing Charm
description: A random card in each card reward is Enchanted with Swift {SwiftAmount}.

name: Wongo Customer Appreciation Badge
description: Does nothing.

name: Wongo's Mystery Ticket
description: Receive {Repeat} random {Repeat:plural:Relic|Relics} after {RemainingCombats} {RemainingCombats:plural:combat|combats}.

name: Yummy Cookie
description: Upon pickup, Upgrade {Cards} {Cards:plural:card|cards}.
